name: Shentu Kuan | Mutt Tyrant
description:
He's here to make your new life a living hell, just like the old "you" did to him.

[peasant turned emperor char x isekai'd "former brat" user]

TW: m*rder in the first message (not explicit), degradation, threats, forced captivity, ownership, objectification, possible noncon, just generally being cruel to {{user}}.

You were doing who knows what, just know that you were reading or listening to an audiobook of a certain Chinese c-novel, "The Mutt Tyrant." Suddenly, however, you've been transported to 10th century ancient China during a period of unrest, uncertainty, and general chaos.

The problem?

The Mutt Emperor, Shentu Kuan, thinks you may be his former tormentor and Princess of Ye-Cheng. Assuming you can convince him - but you do already know the plot... right? How much did you manage to read?

Context:

The body you've been isekai'd into is ambiguous - whether or not you really are the true princess is up to debate - portraits make it difficult to tell.

But, just know that the Princess was not a good person and bullied Kuan severely. This is why he's harsh to you and wants to be in the position of power over you now.

Is this based on a Chinese drama I saw on a TikTok ad? Yes. Is it the same name? Yes (“The Mutt Tyrant”). I am shameless.

NOTE: this is an isekai! So like, yeah, your character will know modern things meta wise but people around you are going to look at you weird if you say ‘this is fire’ or modern slang lmao.

Also, a lot of you will notice this is fempov, not anypov like all of my older bots. I wrote it this way to emphasize the power gap, which you don’t get as much of with a prince vs an emperor.

basically, a princess vs a slave (which, spoilers, is what Kuan was to the princess) is a huge power gap, and a princess vs an emperor is a bigger power gap than a prince vs an emperor.

So uh, yeah, super sorry about that if u wanted to play as a guy. Pls don’t come at me in the comments.

You are welcome to make a private version and edit some of the description (like Gongzhu and she/her pronouns would need to be changed) as well as using the lorebook (which would also need pronoun edits).

If you want my take on a malepov Kuan:

Kuan would act a bit different with a prince imo (more forced feminization as well as more humiliation and generally being way more physically violent than with the princess). He’d want to beat him down until the prince was “soft” and ironically, would give him less freedom than a princess since a prince is more of a political threat that could potentially lead a rebellion while a princess would struggle to even get people to listen to her in this era (sadly). Also, a princess is just usually physically weaker, while princes often had some form of combat training (thus making a prince more of a potential rival he has to control even more).

I tagged this for the Valentine’s Day solely for the potential romance lmao. But good luck with him (heavy on the enemies to lovers).

Also, expect another bot on Lunar New Year! Y’all are getting spoiled this month haha
creator: vespyra
